title: JavaScript Enabling Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on why and how to enable or disable JavaScript in web browsers.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a reason some users might disable JavaScript in their browser?
options: To increase the complexity of the website.

questions.question: Is JavaScript enabled by default in most modern web browsers?
What is the primary role of the <noscript> tag in HTML?
options: To provide alternative content for users with JavaScript disabled.
To define the structure of a page.
To add visual effects to the page.

questions.question: In which browser can you enable/disable JavaScript in the 'About:config' settings?
Does disabling JavaScript affect the visual design of a website?
options: Yes, some features would stop working.
No, it only affects the database.
